description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/zieone/hugo-asciidoctor:master and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a pages job (deploy stage) that runs the command hugo, stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Define a test job (test stage) that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
